Our Specialist

Meet Our Doctor

Experience
15+ Years
Diagnostic & Fetal Imaging

Dr. Sandip Chavan

Consultant Radiologist & Fetal Imaging Specialist

Dr. Sandip Chavan is a highly experienced Consultant Radiologist with over 15 years of expertise in diagnostic and fetal imaging. He practices at Disha Diagnostics, a modern, multispecialty diagnostic center located at Signet Corner, Balewadi Phata, Baner, Pune.

Specialties
Obstetric & Fetal Imaging NT/NB · Anomaly Scan · Doppler Fetal Neurosonography 3D / 4D Scan Musculoskeletal Ultrasound Skin & Nail Ultrasound Nerve Ultrasound
PG Diploma
  • Diploma Expert in Imaging in Maternal Fetal Medicine — University of Barcelona, Spain
  • Diploma in Fetal Neurology — University of Barcelona, Spain
  • Post Graduate Diploma in Musculoskeletal Ultrasound — UCAM University Murcia, Spain
International Training
  • Advanced University Certificate in Maternal Fetal Medicine — University of Barcelona, Spain
  • FMF UK Certified for Anomaly Screening
  • FMF UK Certified for First Trimester Scan (NT Scan)
National Certification
  • Basic Course in Fetal Radiology and Genetics
  • Certificate in Fetal Cardiac Scanning, FMF India
  • Certificate Course in Fetal Aneuploidy Detection
  • Certificate Course in Master Class in Fetal Echocardiography
  • Certificate Mastercourse in Fetal Neurosonography

What We Offer

Comprehensive Diagnostic Services

A full spectrum of radiology, imaging, and speciality diagnostic services — all performed in-house with modern equipment.

From routine sonography to advanced X-ray imaging, we cover all standard diagnostic needs with precision and speed.

Essential cardiac diagnostics including 2D echocardiography and ECG for a thorough evaluation of heart structure and function.

Our Vision

Precision. Trust.
Compassionate Care.

At Disha Diagnostics Baner, we are committed to delivering precise, reliable, and timely diagnostic services — combining advanced superspeciality imaging with comprehensive medical care under one roof.

Our vision is to create a patient-centered clinic where accuracy, trust, and compassionate service form the foundation of every interaction. We continuously invest in modern technology and expert professionals to ensure the highest standards in diagnostics and healthcare.

Every scan performed at Disha Diagnostics reflects our unwavering commitment to clinical excellence and patient well-being.

Why Choose Us

Expertise You Can Rely On

Superspeciality Imaging

From routine sonography to advanced Shear Wave Elastography and Fetal Neurosonography — comprehensive imaging under one roof.

Dedicated Fetal Medicine

Comprehensive pregnancy care across all trimesters — from dating scans to invasive procedures and antenatal counselling.

Doctor-Referred & Trusted

Trusted by gynaecologists and physicians across Pune. Accurate reports and specialist-level interpretation you can rely on.

Advanced Genetic Evaluation

NIPT, FISH, Karyotyping, Microarray and Clinical Exome Sequencing — all offered in-house.

Prime Location, Baner

Conveniently located at Signet Corner, Balewadi Phata — easily accessible from Baner, Wakad, Balewadi and Hinjewadi.

Our Clinic

A Modern, Welcoming Space

Clean, well-equipped, and designed with patient comfort in mind — our clinic at Signet Corner sets the standard for diagnostic excellence in Baner.

Pregnancy Journey

Fetal Medicine Across All Trimesters

Specialised scans and monitoring at every key stage — from the dating scan in the first trimester to fetal well-being monitoring in the third.

1st
8 – 12 Weeks
Dating Scan
NT
12 – 13+6 Weeks
NT Scan · Pre-eclampsia Screening · First Trimester Screening
EA
16 – 18 Weeks
Early Anomaly Scan
AS
18 – 24 Weeks
Anomaly Scan · Fetal ECHO · Genetic Sonogram · Cervix Elastography
3rd
After 24 Weeks
Growth Scan · Neurosonography · Doppler · 3D/4D

Advanced Procedures

Specialised Services & Evaluations

Fetal Invasive Procedures

Performed by experienced specialists using precision guidance — high-risk procedures offered in-house.

  • Chorionic Villous Sampling (CVS) — 10 to 14 weeks
  • Amniocentesis — after 16 weeks
  • Fetal Reduction
  • Fetal Interstitial Laser Therapy (RFA)
  • Fetal Cordocentesis

Fetal Genetic Evaluation

Comprehensive Genetic testing to support informed antenatal decision-making.

  • Double Marker — 11 to 14 weeks
  • Quadruple Marker Test — 15 to 20 weeks
  • NIPT (after NT scan)
  • FISH and Karyotyping
  • Microarray and Clinical Exome Sequencing
  • Antenatal Counselling

Shearwave Elastography

Simple painless technique for detection of tissue stiffness.

  • Liver Elastography (Fibroscan)
  • Fat Quatification of fatty liver
  • Breast lesion elastography
  • Nerve Elastography
  • Cervix Elastography
  • Muscle Elastography

USG Guided Procedures

Precision-guided interventional procedures using real-time ultrasound imaging.

  • USG Guided FNAC
  • USG Guided Biopsy
  • USG Guided Abscess Drainage

Our Equipment

Advanced Imaging Technology

State-of-the-Art Sonography — Baner, Pune

Two World-Class Ultrasound Machines Under One Roof

At Disha Diagnostics, we have invested in two premium ultrasound systems to ensure every patient receives the most accurate, high-resolution imaging available — from routine scans to advanced fetal medicine procedures.

  • High-definition B-mode and advanced colour Doppler imaging
  • Superior resolution for detailed fetal anatomical assessment
  • Real-time 3D and 4D volume sonography capability
  • Precise musculoskeletal and small-parts imaging
  • Consistent, reproducible results across all diagnostic scan types
Our Sonography Machines
Samsung V6 High-performance ultrasound platform delivering exceptional image clarity and advanced Doppler capabilities — ideal for comprehensive general and gynaecology imaging.
Voluson GE S10 GE Healthcare's premium women's health system — the gold standard for fetal medicine, obstetrics, and gynaecology with industry-leading 3D/4D imaging technology.
Samsung V6 & Voluson GE S10
Two premium machines — always available for our patients

Important Notice

As per the PCPNDT Act, a doctor's signature, stamp, and clinic address are mandatory for all obstetrics (pregnancy) sonography referrals.

Please carry your referring doctor's prescription and any previous scan reports when attending for pregnancy-related imaging.
